data.title: Capgemini and McDonald's renew their strategic partnership with a global multi-year agreement focused on delivering modern, scalable platforms
data.description: Capgemini has recently revealed a significant development regarding its partnership with McDonald’s Corporation. The two companies have agreed to extend their strategic collaboration by five years. This extension emphasizes their commitment to supporting modern and scalable platforms catering to various guest needs. This ongoing partnership highlights a long-term dedication to enhancing services and experiences.

data.title: New Publication: US clinicians' real-world Nevisense experience improves melanoma detection
data.description: On March 5, 2026, SciBase Holding AB revealed that Stephen D. Hess, MD, PhD, FAAD, has recently published a clinical article showcasing his practical use of SciBase's AI-driven diagnostic tools for skin conditions. SciBase, traded as STO: SCIB, specializes in developing advanced solutions for dermatological issues. Dr. Hess's publication underscores the efficacy of these technologies in real-world scenarios.

data.title: 139th Canton Fair Set to Open as Global Partners Organize Delegations to Attend
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, the upcoming 139th Canton Fair is set to commence on April 15, 2026. There is notable excitement among global partners who are actively coordinating their member companies to participate in the event. Currently, approximately 30 Canton Fair Global Cooperative Partners have already finalized arrangements to mobilize for the fair.

data.title: BD Advances Iliac Artery Treatment Across the European Union
data.description: A globally renowned medical technology company, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), headquartered in Franklin Lakes, New Jersey, revealed on March 5, 2026, that it has secured CE Marking for its latest product, the Revello™ Vascular Covered Stent. This innovative endovascular solution is designed to address vascular issues and has garnered significant attention. BD, listed on NYSE as BDX, continues to make strides in the medical field with this advanced stent, marking a notable achievement.

data.title: Volvo Car AB (publ.) publishes Annual and Sustainability Report 2025
data.description: Volvo Car AB (publ.) of Gothenburg, Sweden, recently released its Annual and Sustainability Report for 2025 on the Investors website, which can be accessed here. The report highlights the company's strategic objectives and endeavors in addition to detailing the events and financial performance throughout 2025. Adhering to European Sustainability Reporting Standards, the report includes the Sustainability Statement. For the entirety of 2025, Volvo Cars achieved an adjusted operating income of SEK 12.5 billion with an adjusted EBIT margin of 3.5 percent. Despite facing a challenging external environment, the company managed a full-year free cash flow of SEK 2.4 billion. Volvo Cars also saw growth in full-year retail deliveries, reaching [specific number not provided].For more detailed information, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CCTV+: Dragon Dance Celebrates Lantern Festival in Historic City of Quzhou
data.description: In Beijing on March 4, 2026, a special event was held on March 3 to celebrate the Lantern Festival in Quzhou. The festival, titled "Dragon Soaring Over the Ancient City • Fortune Bestowed Upon Quzhou" in 2026, showcased a remarkable dragon dance performance and exhibition with the participation of 18 dragon dance troupes in the historic city.

The economy has also seen a growth of 2.9% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and indicating a positive trend. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a surge, with the main index increasing by 5% in the past week. These numbers reflect a robust and thriving economy, with strong indicators for continued growth in the near future.

data.title: Tech giant finds iOS exploit kit in crypto phishing attacks. Kit can steal wallet info.
data.description: According to recent research findings, counterfeit cryptocurrency websites have been utilizing an iOS exploit kit that can pilfer wallet seed phrases and other crucial financial information. This discovery sheds light on the growing concern of fraudulent activities in the crypto space. The exploit kit specifically targeted iOS users, increasing the risk for individuals engaging in cryptocurrency transactions on their devices. This revelation underscores the need for heightened cybersecurity measures, especially as the exploit kit has the potential to compromise sensitive data. As per the research, the fake websites have already affected a significant number of users, emphasizing the urgency for vigilance and caution when navigating the cryptocurrency landscape.

data.title: Hunting PLC (“Hunting” or “the Company” or “the Group”) Cost Reduction Plan and Update to Capital Allocation Priorities
data.description: London-based company Hunting PLC (LSE: HTG) announced updates on their cost reduction plans as part of their Hunting 2030 Strategy. The plan, set to be completed by the end of 2027, aims to enhance profitability and streamline central costs, with anticipated savings of approximately $15 million. This initiative is in addition to previously announced savings. The company also informed investors about their capital allocation priorities.
